summary: Created docs/PAYROLL-MOBILE-SLIP.md — comprehensive guide for mobile frontend to render payroll slip identically to web: API endpoints, slip_sections/totals usage, exact layout order, formatting rules, React Native/Flutter examples, migration from old API, QA checklist. current_status: Mobile integration documentation ready at docs/PAYROLL-MOBILE-SLIP.md. Team mobile can follow this to match web slip display without recalculating totals client-side.
